websearch.name: Web Search
websearch.description: Search the web via the configured websearch MCP provider (SerpAPI / Exa)
websearch.tool_hint: You have access to web search via the web_search tool. Use it whenever the user asks for current, recent, external, or source-backed information — news, prices, version numbers, documentation, anything where your training data may be stale or insufficient. Pass a focused query string; n_results defaults to 10. Search results are pointers only: cite URLs from the results, quote sparingly, and say so when the snippets don't fully answer the question rather than inventing details.
